import('leaflet').then(({ default: L }) => { const map = L.map('map').setView([30, 10], 2); L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', { attribution: '© OpenStreetMap contributors', maxZoom: 18 }).addTo(map); const cities = [ [37.7749, -122.4194, 'San Francisco', 182], [51.5074, -0.1278, 'London', 147], [52.5200, 13.4050, 'Berlin', 98], [35.6762, 139.6503, 'Tokyo', 76], [-23.5505, -46.6333, 'São Paulo', 52], [56.9496, 24.1052, 'Riga', 31] ]; cities.forEach(([lat, lng, name, count]) => { L.circleMarker([lat, lng], { radius: Math.max(6, Math.sqrt(count) * 1.5), color: '#1ABB9C', fillColor: '#1ABB9C', fillOpacity: 0.4, weight: 2 }).addTo(map).bindPopup(`${name}
${count} customers`); }); });
